liveIntentIgnored: This scanner only reads RPC/local files. It never deploys, upgrades, closes, or sends transactions.

architectureFinding.csdm: CSDM is live, upgradeable, and local keeper authority matches. It is the strongest candidate for backing-vault / flash-lend / HOP-redeem integration.
architectureFinding.atom: atom_ickk program ID is free and local program keypair matches; use as clean fresh deploy slot if we avoid upgrading live CSDM.
architectureFinding.enchancedblock: ENCHANCEDBLOCK is controlled live infra; keep it as external Orca actuator/source, not as the redeem vault.
architectureFinding.ora: ora-culoxx is controlled live infra; keep as oracle/freshness helper.

candidateSummary.recommendedNextBuild: Build exact CSDM upgrade/sim receipt for ix7 flash_lend_backing plus HOP burn/redeem-to-USDC path.
candidateSummary.cashStatus: No profit booked. Program control only removes an engineering blocker; cash proof still needs wallet SOL/USDC delta through RedemptionCashRelay.

programInspections.name: atom_ickk
programInspections.useRecommendation: Best clean deploy slot if we avoid touching live infra; not a cash source by itself.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: clean deploy slot; no close/upgrade needed

programInspections.name: CSDM
programInspections.useRecommendation: Best live candidate if local authority matches; add HOP redeem or ix7 proof before any cash claim.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: upgrade candidate, not close candidate; preserve live ID and add exact receipt before any upgrade

programInspections.name: ENCHANCEDBLOCK
programInspections.role: authority-controlled venue plus external Orca settlement source
programInspections.useRecommendation: Keep live; use as actuator/source only after exact sim receipt with SOL/USDC delta.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: controlled live infra; do not close by default, upgrade only with exact receipt

programInspections.name: ora-culoxx
programInspections.useRecommendation: Keep live as oracle truth helper; not a cash source.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: controlled live infra; do not close by default, upgrade only with exact receipt

programInspections.name: ROLLBLOCK
programInspections.useRecommendation: Optional judge; not required before RedemptionCashRelay receipt path.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: not a usable deploy/upgrade target from this scan

programInspections.name: flywheel-1
programInspections.useRecommendation: Archaeology only unless executable and controlled.
programInspections.closeOrUpgradePosition: not a usable deploy/upgrade target from this scan

csdm.liveIx7Assumption: Do not assume ix7 is live until binary hash or exact ix7 simulation proves it on Q9.

atom.use: fresh deploy slot for atom-style capital window or HOP redeem vault if CSDM upgrade is not chosen

cashProofGate.eligibilityProof: Program target exists for build path, but no SOL/USDC source receipt is attached.
cashProofGate.instructionPath: TBD: exact CSDM ix7 or atom-derived redeem-vault instruction receipt required.
cashProofGate.settlementPathToSolUsdc: TBD: HOP/custom/accounting units must burn/lock/redeem into spendable SOL/USDC.
cashProofGate.costModel: TBD: upgrade/deploy rent, transaction fees, flash repay, Orca fees, tips, and liabilities must be priced.
rejectionReasons: program control is not cash profit
CSDM/atom still need exact no-send simulation receipt
HOP/custom token value still needs burn/redeem or external SOL/USDC settlement proof
RedemptionCashRelay must receive authority-exclusive SOL/USDC source receipt before live

nextRequiredExactBuild: For CSDM path: prove local build fits current ProgramData or plan buffer extension; simulate ix7 flash_lend_backing against exact accounts.
For atom path: add HOP redeem-vault instruction and deploy only behind a separate approval receipt.
Wire ENCHANCEDBLOCK source receipt so Orca settlement shows afterRaw > beforeRaw in SOL/USDC after all costs.
Feed the final source receipt into npm run redemption-cash-relay-plan and require READY_NO_LIVE before any live step.
